results.content: What you do is fill up water in the reservoir, fill up beans in the container, empty the used coffee bin when it’s full, empty the water tray when it’s full. Lights will come on when any of these is required. There’s a button to adjust how fine you want the coffee grounds, a button to select the strength of aroma, a button to select the concentration (quantity) of coffee.; there is the option to make a single or double. It makes regular coffee and espresso, frothing is very easy and cleaning the frothier is even easier, it dispenses hot water too. Overall it’s a great machine. It takes some time to find the right setting for your taste but once figured out, coffee is enjoyable. It’s important to follow the set up instructions before starting the use of the machine. I always use filtered [...] 5.
